---
title: "Marine Heat Wave videos"
subtitle: ""
format: html
listing:
  id: videos_avi
  contents: videos.yml
  field-display-names:
    title: "Year"
    description: "Link"
  type: table
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 50
---

## 2024

{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/U2nVnUmr5uw height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

## 2023
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/q2GADbAY-4c height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

## 2022
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/g8wZh2IbnCo height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

## 2021
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/plLRU41uEXA height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

## 2020
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/hreLz4eRBrY height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

## 2019
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/yqXIlFdjB0c height="320px" width="360px" rel="0" start="5" autoplay="0">}}

# Downloads and Previous years

::: {#videos_avi}
:::
